mechanism_narrative: Elevated federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly suppressing S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are positive in > 60% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending economic contraction, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite rising unemployment.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals yield negative forward returns in > 55% of cases over a 2-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects improving manufacturing capacity utilization and supply-side momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Direction flips to negative during tightening periods or Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index levels exceeding 300.0 indicate entrenched inflationary pressures that force central banks to maintain restrictive policy, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in > 60% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds 300.0.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising nonfarm payrolls and falling unemployment confirms genuine labor market tightening, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Combined signal fails to predict positive returns with statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarter-over-quarter growth in chained dollars GDP reflects expanding aggregate demand and corporate revenue fundamentals, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank correlation between GDP growth and 60-day forward returns remains below 0.05 across all tested periods.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in industrial production exceeding 0.5 percent signals immediate supply-side contraction and inventory drawdowns, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX yields positive 5-day returns in > 70% of instances following the specified industrial production decline.
